critical.issue: com.example.* as applicationId in all apps
critical.impact: Google Play and App Store will reject all apps immediately
critical.fix: Replace com.example.* with production identifiers (e.g. com.alhai.*)

critical.issue: Debug signing keys used for all apps
critical.impact: Cannot publish to any app store
critical.fix: Create production keystores + key.properties for each app

critical.issue: .dart_define.env not excluded from Git
critical.impact: Secret keys and credentials leaked in public repository
critical.fix: Add .dart_define.env to .gitignore + purge from Git history if present

critical.issue: No Firebase config files exist
critical.impact: All Firebase features (notifications, analytics, Crashlytics) non-functional
critical.fix: Create Firebase projects + download config files for each app

critical.issue: CORS wildcard * in Edge Functions
critical.impact: Any website can call the platform's API
critical.fix: Replace * with specific allowed domains (e.g. https://app.alhai.sa)

critical.issue: SQL injection in public-products endpoint
critical.impact: Read/modify/delete any data in the database
critical.fix: Sanitize input: search.replace(/[%,.()]/g, '') before use in filter

critical.issue: XSS vulnerability in HTML receipt generation
critical.impact: Malicious code execution in user browser via product data
critical.fix: Apply HTML encoding on all inputs in receipt templates

critical.issue: 73 missing foreign keys in Drift database
critical.impact: No data integrity guarantees - orphan records possible
critical.fix: Add references() to all FK columns in Drift table definitions

critical.issue: No database transactions for compound operations
critical.impact: Partial financial operations on mid-process failure
critical.fix: Wrap sales, returns, transfers in database.transaction()

critical.issue: Race conditions in financial operations (AccountsDao + LoyaltyDao)
critical.impact: Lost updates on concurrent balance/points changes
critical.fix: Use atomic SQL: UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance + ? WHERE id = ?

critical.issue: ~245 files with hardcoded colors bypassing theme system
critical.impact: Dark mode broken in most screens
critical.fix: Replace Color(0xFF...) with Theme.of(context).colorScheme references

critical.issue: 883 missing translation keys in 5 languages
critical.file: ARB files (en, ur, hi, bn, fil, id)
critical.impact: 5 languages at only 70% - poor UX for non-Arabic users
critical.fix: Complete all ARB files for missing keys

critical.issue: LazyScreen built but never used - no code splitting
critical.impact: Wasted infrastructure - no web code splitting
critical.fix: Enable LazyScreen with deferred loading for web

critical.issue: 4 apps have only dummy/placeholder tests
critical.impact: Zero effective test coverage - undetected bugs
critical.fix: Write real Widget and Unit tests for all 4 apps

critical.issue: Missing auth guards in 3 apps
critical.impact: Unauthenticated users can access protected screens
critical.fix: Add GoRouter redirect to check auth state

critical.issue: No production Flavors (dev/staging/prod)
critical.impact: Cannot separate environments - risk of production data corruption
critical.fix: Create flavor configs + .dart_define files for each environment

critical.issue: No code obfuscation enabled
critical.impact: Source code easily reverse-engineered
critical.fix: Enable --obfuscate --split-debug-info in build commands

critical.issue: Missing iOS folders for 3 apps
critical.impact: Cannot build or deploy iOS versions
critical.fix: flutter create + migrate settings

critical.issue: CI/CD only covers 1 of 7 apps
critical.impact: 6 apps have no automated build/test pipeline
critical.fix: Extend GitHub Actions workflows to cover all 7 apps

critical.issue: No CASCADE rules for foreign key operations
critical.impact: Orphan records on parent deletion
critical.fix: Define CASCADE, SET NULL, or RESTRICT for each FK relationship

critical.issue: No Storage Bucket policies configured
critical.impact: Unrestricted file upload/download access
critical.fix: Define upload/read permissions for each storage bucket

critical.issue: No server-side file type/size validation
critical.impact: Malicious or oversized files can be uploaded
critical.fix: Add MIME type and file size validation middleware

critical.issue: double.parse/int.parse without try-catch in 30+ locations
critical.impact: Unhandled FormatException crashes on invalid input
critical.fix: Replace with double.tryParse/int.tryParse

critical.issue: 35 empty catch blocks
critical.impact: Errors silently swallowed - impossible to debug
critical.fix: Add proper error logging in all catch blocks

critical.issue: 497 generic catch(e) blocks without specific exception types
critical.impact: All exceptions caught indiscriminately - hides real bugs
critical.fix: Replace with specific exception types

critical.issue: Dual DI system (Riverpod + GetIt) causing confusion
critical.impact: Inconsistent dependency injection, harder maintenance
critical.fix: Choose one DI system and remove the other

critical.issue: Dart SDK version conflicts between packages
critical.impact: Build failures and incompatibilities
critical.fix: Unify Dart SDK constraints across all packages

critical.issue: Drift version conflicts between packages
critical.impact: Incompatible database code between packages
critical.fix: Align drift version across all pubspec.yaml files

critical.issue: Missing Privacy Usage Descriptions in iOS Info.plist
critical.impact: App Store will reject apps missing NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription, NSCameraUsageDescription
critical.fix: Add all required privacy keys to Info.plist for each app

critical.issue: No environment variables passed in CI/CD builds
critical.impact: App builds with empty SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY values
critical.fix: Use GitHub Secrets: --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}

critical.issue: Supabase URL hardcoded in Python config
critical.impact: Real Supabase URL visible in source code
critical.fix: Move to environment variables only: os.environ.get('SUPABASE_URL')

critical.issue: Missing authorization check in upload-product-images
critical.impact: Authenticated user can update products they don't own if RLS incomplete
critical.fix: Verify user is store member/admin before allowing product image upload

critical.issue: Missing input size validation in upload-product-images
critical.impact: No max size limit - DoS via extremely large image uploads
critical.fix: Validate required fields exist and limit each image to 5MB max

critical.issue: No pagination in get_store_products RPC function
critical.impact: Returns ALL products as single JSONB - massive memory usage with thousands of products
critical.fix: Add p_limit/p_offset parameters with LIMIT/OFFSET to query

critical.issue: Missing automatic updated_at trigger in Supabase
critical.impact: App must manually set updated_at - risk of forgotten updates breaking sync
critical.fix: Create universal BEFORE UPDATE trigger function for all tables

critical.issue: Major Drift-Supabase schema mismatch (IDs, table names, columns)
critical.impact: ID type mismatches (TEXT vs UUID), table name differences (purchases vs purchase_orders), column mismatches break sync
critical.fix: Create Drift-Supabase mapping document and implement bidirectional type conversion layer

critical.issue: Soft delete pattern completely missing from all 50 tables
critical.impact: No is_deleted/deleted_at column - data recovery impossible after deletion
critical.fix: Add deleted_at nullable DateTime to all main tables with partial index WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

critical.issue: orders.updatedAt is non-nullable (inconsistent with all other tables)
critical.impact: Requires updatedAt value even for new inserts, unlike all other tables
critical.fix: Change to: DateTimeColumn get updatedAt => dateTime().nullable()()

critical.issue: Missing UNIQUE constraints on receipt/order/purchase/return numbers
critical.impact: Duplicate receipt numbers, order numbers, coupon codes possible - no DB-level enforcement
critical.fix: Add composite unique constraints: (storeId, receiptNo) UNIQUE for sales, similar for others

critical.issue: 7 completely duplicated file groups across packages
critical.impact: secure_http_client.dart, production_logger.dart, whatsapp_config.dart, theme_provider.dart, local_products_repository.dart, local_categories_repository.dart, supabase_config.dart all duplicated 2-3 times
critical.fix: Move to alhai_core shared package and import from single source

critical.issue: 24 god files over 1000 lines (up to 2,677 lines)
critical.impact: Unmaintainable code, high cognitive load, merge conflicts
critical.fix: Split each file into focused widgets (max 500 lines). Priority: pos_screen, customer_detail, payment_screen

critical.issue: Missing UNIQUE constraints on junction tables (org_members, user_stores, favorites)
critical.impact: Duplicate memberships, favorites, loyalty records possible
critical.fix: Add UNIQUE(orgId, userId), UNIQUE(userId, storeId), UNIQUE(storeId, productId), UNIQUE(customerId, storeId)

critical.issue: AppScaffold forces RTL with hardcoded TextDirection.rtl - breaks 5 LTR languages
critical.impact: English, Hindi, Bengali, Filipino, Indonesian users see reversed layout
critical.fix: Replace TextDirection.rtl with Directionality.of(context) to respect current locale

critical.issue: Colors.white used ~1,153 times in apps/ without dark mode check
critical.file: apps/admin/ (79 in customer_ledger alone), apps/cashier/, apps/admin_lite/
critical.impact: Blinding white backgrounds in dark mode across most screens
critical.fix: Replace Colors.white with colorScheme.surface or Theme.of(context).colorScheme.surface

critical.issue: colorScheme usage only ~3% - 13 uses vs 2,193 Colors.* and 245 Color(0x...) in apps/
critical.impact: Theme system completely bypassed - dark mode fundamentally broken
critical.fix: Migrate to colorScheme references: surface, onSurface, primary, error, etc.

critical.issue: Color(0xFF1E293B) hardcoded 332 times - differs from both surfaceDark token systems
critical.file: 150+ files across apps/ and packages/ (isDark ? Color(0xFF1E293B) : Colors.white pattern)
critical.impact: 3 different dark surface colors: #1E1E1E (design_system), #1F2937 (shared_ui), #1E293B (hardcoded)
critical.fix: Create shared AppCard widget using colorScheme.surface, replace all 332 occurrences

critical.issue: Colors.white used ~443 times in packages/ without dark mode check
critical.impact: Shared components break dark mode for all apps that use them
critical.fix: Replace with colorScheme.surface in shared package components

critical.issue: No AnimatedList anywhere in project - items appear/disappear abruptly
critical.file: All list screens (cart, products, customers, invoices)
critical.impact: Poor UX when adding/removing cart items, list items appear/disappear without animation
critical.fix: Use AnimatedList/SliverAnimatedList for cart and other dynamic lists

critical.issue: No global Error Boundary (FlutterError.onError, PlatformDispatcher.onError, runZonedGuarded)
critical.impact: Unhandled errors crash the app silently - no crash reporting in production
critical.fix: Add runZonedGuarded + FlutterError.onError + PlatformDispatcher.instance.onError in every main()

critical.issue: SQL injection via dynamic table/column names in sync operations (5 files)
critical.impact: Table names from Supabase responses injected directly into SQL - potential data manipulation
critical.fix: Add whitelist of allowed table names; validate tableName before customStatement

critical.issue: No timeout for any Supabase SDK calls (select/upsert/rpc) across sync and auth
critical.impact: Server delay freezes entire UI indefinitely - no user feedback or recovery
critical.fix: Add .timeout(Duration(seconds: 30)) to all Supabase SDK calls

high.issue: schema.json outdated - contains 10 tables while actual DB has 50
high.fix: Regenerate: dart run drift_dev schema dump lib/src/app_database.dart lib/src/schema.json

high.issue: Missing indexes on order_items and other tables
high.fix: Add @TableIndex for orderId and productId columns on order_items and similar tables

high.issue: No JOIN queries - 27 DAOs use multiple separate queries
high.fix: Refactor DAOs to use JOIN queries where appropriate

high.issue: 37 ListView should be ListView.builder for performance
high.fix: Replace ListView with ListView.builder for long lists

high.issue: Image.network used instead of CachedNetworkImage in 7 files
high.fix: Replace with CachedNetworkImage for image caching

high.issue: pos_screen.dart is 2,677 lines - too large
high.fix: Split into smaller widget files (max 500 lines each)

high.issue: Code duplication between 7 apps
high.fix: Move shared code to alhai_core/alhai_services/alhai_shared_ui packages

high.issue: 8 packages missing analysis_options.yaml
high.fix: Copy and adapt analysis_options.yaml from existing package

high.issue: No global Error Boundary for unhandled exceptions
high.fix: Add FlutterError.onError + runZonedGuarded error boundary

high.issue: Duplicate color systems: AlhaiColors + AppColors
high.fix: Keep one color system and remove the other

high.issue: 3 different breakpoint systems in use
high.fix: Choose one breakpoint system and standardize

high.issue: 194 old MediaQuery.of usages instead of modern alternatives
high.fix: Replace with LayoutBuilder or custom responsive utilities

high.issue: 15 responsive tools built but never used
high.fix: Wire up existing responsive tools to screens

high.issue: No OrientationBuilder for main screens
high.fix: Add OrientationBuilder for critical screens

high.issue: 3 different animation systems need unification
high.fix: Merge into single animation token system

high.issue: No Hero Animations for product list/detail transitions
high.fix: Add Hero widgets for product list-to-detail navigation

high.issue: No page transitions in Admin app
high.fix: Add page transition animations

high.issue: ~735 hardcoded Arabic text strings not in localization files
high.fix: Extract to ARB files and replace with AppLocalizations references

high.issue: No plural/gender forms in translations
high.fix: Add ICU plural/gender syntax for numbers

high.issue: Skeleton/Shimmer loading components built but not used
high.fix: Enable shimmer loading in data-fetching screens

high.issue: No pagination for long lists (products, customers, orders)
high.fix: Add infinite scroll / load-more pagination

high.issue: Poor accessibility - no Semantics labels on interactive elements
high.fix: Add Semantics widgets to buttons, inputs, and interactive elements

high.issue: 37 services have zero test coverage
high.fix: Write unit tests for critical services (sales, inventory, sync)

high.issue: No code coverage setup (lcov)
high.fix: Setup lcov with minimum 60% threshold

high.issue: No performance tests
high.fix: Add load time, list scrolling, and search performance tests

high.issue: No integration tests for end-to-end flows
high.fix: Write login -> sale -> receipt integration scenarios

high.issue: No timeouts on Supabase API calls
high.fix: Add 30-second timeout to all network calls

high.issue: Orphan images accumulating in Cloudflare R2
high.fix: Create cron job to clean unlinked images

high.issue: Commercial license compliance unchecked (Syncfusion)
high.fix: Verify Syncfusion license compliance for commercial use

high.issue: Inconsistent .named() pattern in Loyalty tables vs rest of codebase
high.fix: Remove .named() from loyalty tables to use automatic camelCase->snake_case conversion like all other 47 tables

high.issue: Inconsistent createdAt default values - only 3 tables use .withDefault(currentDateAndTime)
high.fix: Add .withDefault(currentDateAndTime) to createdAt in all tables or remove from loyalty tables

high.issue: Inconsistent quantity column types: IntColumn qty vs RealColumn quantity
high.fix: Standardize to RealColumn get qty => real()() across all tables for fractional quantity support

high.issue: Barcode not unique within store - missing composite unique index
high.fix: Add @TableIndex(name: 'idx_products_store_barcode', columns: {#storeId, #barcode}, unique: true)

high.issue: alhai_reports: 15 report screens with zero test coverage
high.fix: Write screen tests for complaints, sales_analytics, debts, staff_performance, balance_sheet, cash_flow, comparison, zakat, purchase, customer, peak_hours, daily_sales, profit, tax, vat reports

high.issue: Integration tests are superficial - only check MaterialApp/ProviderScope/Scaffold exist
high.fix: Write full flow tests: complete sale, return flow, shift close, offline sync conflict

high.issue: Screen tests too shallow - no user interactions, no data flow testing
high.fix: Convert to interactive tests: tap buttons, enter input, verify navigation, test error and loading states

high.issue: 10 files with 10+ classes in single file
high.fix: Extract each class into its own file following single-responsibility principle

high.issue: 45 TODO comments marking incomplete implementations across services
high.file: alhai_services/ (ai_service 7, print_service 6, payment_gateway 6, sms_service 2, backup_service 2, geo_notification 3, auth screens 3, shared_ui 5, others 11)
high.fix: Complete or create tickets for: payment gateway SDK integration, print service bluetooth, AI service API calls, geo-notification FCM

high.issue: Excessive setState usage (1,252 calls in 106 StatefulWidgets) instead of Riverpod
high.file: Various screens - top offenders: pos_settings_screen (31), payment_screen (23), customers_screen (19), quick_sale_screen (19)
high.fix: Migrate StatefulWidgets to ConsumerStatefulWidget with Riverpod providers for state management

high.issue: 716 force unwrap (!) operator usages creating crash risks
high.fix: Replace with ?? operator for defaults, proper null checks, or .let()/.map() patterns

high.issue: SafeArea used in only 40 of 195 screens (20.5%) - notch/status bar overlap risk
high.file: All standalone screens not using LazyScreen or AppScaffold shell
high.fix: Add SafeArea to all screens that don't inherit it from shell pattern

high.issue: Distributor Portal wraps every screen with Directionality(textDirection: TextDirection.rtl) instead of global
high.file: distributor_portal/lib/screens/ (5 screens: settings, reports, products, pricing, order_detail)
high.fix: Apply RTL globally in main.dart like cashier/admin apps, remove per-screen Directionality wrappers

high.issue: TabBarTheme, IconButton hover, and Chip selectedColor use fixed light-mode colors
high.fix: Make unselectedLabelColor, hoverColor, highlightColor, selectedColor vary with isDark parameter

high.issue: 176 BoxShadow locations invisible in dark mode (Colors.black alpha on dark background)
high.fix: Create AppShadow.of(context) helper that returns theme-aware shadows

medium.issue: Minification disabled in Android release builds
medium.fix: Set isMinifyEnabled = true, isShrinkResources = true with proper ProGuard rules

medium.issue: Firebase versions inconsistent across apps (v2 vs v3)
medium.fix: Update all to firebase_core ^3.x.x

medium.issue: 4 apps missing Supabase config (customer_app, driver_app, distributor_portal, super_admin)
medium.fix: Create supabase_config.dart using String.fromEnvironment() in each app

medium.issue: Web deployment strategy inadequate - only GitHub Pages for cashier
medium.fix: Setup CDN (Cloudflare Pages/Vercel/Netlify) for all web apps

medium.issue: Web manifest and index.html generic ('A new Flutter project')
medium.fix: Customize each app's name, description, and meta tags

medium.issue: No custom app icons - all use Flutter defaults
medium.fix: Use flutter_launcher_icons package to generate custom icons

medium.issue: No Web security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options)
medium.fix: Add Content-Security-Policy and other security headers to web server config or HTML

medium.issue: AI Server Dockerfile not production-ready (no .dockerignore, no multi-stage, no health check)
medium.fix: Implement multi-stage build, health checks, non-root user, .dockerignore

medium.issue: ProGuard rules exist but minification disabled - rules broken
medium.fix: Enable minification AND expand rules for Supabase, Riverpod, GoRouter

medium.issue: App display names generic (android:label='cashier' instead of 'Alhai Cashier')
medium.fix: Use proper display names: 'Alhai Cashier', 'Alhai Admin' etc.

medium.issue: melos scripts limited - only 3 apps have build scripts, no iOS builds
medium.fix: Add complete build scripts for all 7 apps with --dart-define support

medium.issue: GitHub Actions workflow not modular - single monolithic file
medium.fix: Split into: build.yml, release.yml, security-scan.yml, dependency-audit.yml

medium.issue: Supabase URL exposed in .env.example with real production URL
medium.fix: Replace with placeholder: SUPABASE_URL=https://your-project.supabase.co

medium.issue: Android INTERNET permission not declared in main manifest
medium.fix: Add <uses-permission android:name='android.permission.INTERNET' /> to main manifest

medium.issue: In-memory rate limiter only - bypassed in serverless environment
medium.fix: Use Redis or Supabase KV Store for distributed rate limiting

medium.issue: Rate limiter memory leak - rateLimitMap never cleaned
medium.fix: Add periodic cleanup or use LRU cache with size limits

medium.issue: deduct_stock_on_order_confirm missing cancellation logic - stock never returned
medium.fix: Add trigger to restore stock when order status changes to 'cancelled'

medium.issue: voidSale sets updated_at to NULL instead of current time
medium.fix: Change to Value(DateTime.now()) to preserve edit history and sync

medium.issue: Missing input validation in RPC functions (NULL/empty store_id accepted)
medium.fix: Add: IF p_store_id IS NULL OR p_store_id = '' THEN RAISE EXCEPTION 'store_id is required'; END IF;

medium.issue: LIKE pattern injection in ProductsDao - special chars %, _ not escaped
medium.fix: Escape: query.replaceAll('%', '\\%').replaceAll('_', '\\_')

medium.issue: Duplicate function definitions across 3 SQL files (is_super_admin, is_store_member, is_store_admin)
medium.fix: Define once in supabase_init.sql, remove duplicates from migration files

medium.issue: Conflicting RLS policies on store_members - 4 different SELECT policies
medium.fix: Consolidate into single file, remove conflicting policies

medium.issue: Missing transaction in InventoryDao complex operations (recordSaleMovement, recordPurchaseMovement)
medium.fix: Wrap movement recording + quantity update in single database.transaction()

medium.issue: Missing INDEX on FTS table for JOIN performance with products table
medium.fix: Ensure proper index for FTS-products JOIN, consider using content_rowid

medium.issue: audit_log ID based only on timestamp - collision risk
medium.fix: Use UUID v4 instead of DateTime.now().millisecondsSinceEpoch

medium.issue: Missing Foreign Key on store_members.store_id to stores.id
medium.fix: ALTER TABLE store_members ADD CONSTRAINT fk_store_members_store_id FOREIGN KEY (store_id) REFERENCES stores(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

medium.issue: Missing updatedAt in 10 tables (sale_items, favorites, held_invoices, order_items, etc.)
medium.fix: Add DateTimeColumn get updatedAt => dateTime().nullable()() to held_invoices, customer_addresses, returns, product_expiry, purchase_items, expense_categories

medium.issue: Missing syncedAt in 11 sync-required tables
medium.fix: Add syncedAt to order_items, order_status_history, customer_addresses, return_items, purchase_items, daily_summaries

medium.issue: 10 JSON columns stored as TEXT without validation (discounts, promotions, stock_takes, etc.)
medium.fix: Add JSON validation in DAO/Repository layer using json.decode() wrapper in getters

medium.issue: No ENUM validation - TEXT status/type columns accept any value
medium.fix: Add .check(status.isIn(['created','confirmed','preparing','ready','delivered'])) or validate in DAOs

medium.issue: Missing onOpen callback in MigrationStrategy - PRAGMA foreign_keys not enabled
medium.fix: Add onOpen: (details) async { await customStatement('PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON'); }

medium.issue: DriversTable and 8 other tables missing orgId for multi-tenant isolation
medium.fix: Add TextColumn get orgId => text().nullable()() to drivers, held_invoices, favorites, stock_takes, stock_transfers, settings, order_status_history, whatsapp_messages, whatsapp_templates

medium.issue: Missing composite index on stores(orgId, storeId) for multi-tenant queries
medium.fix: Add @TableIndex(name: 'idx_stores_org_id_store_id', columns: {#orgId, #storeId})

medium.issue: HeldInvoicesTable missing syncedAt and updatedAt for cross-device sync
medium.fix: Add syncedAt and updatedAt columns

medium.issue: Mismatched default values: products.min_qty = 0 (Supabase) vs 1 (Drift)
medium.fix: Align to same default in both (choose based on business logic)

medium.issue: Column name mismatch: orders.discount (Drift) vs discount_amount (Supabase)
medium.fix: Standardize naming or add mapping in sync layer

medium.issue: REAL vs DECIMAL precision risk for financial data (floating-point errors)
medium.fix: Convert monetary values to integer smallest units (fils/cents) in DAO layer, or use Decimal package

medium.issue: Inconsistent lint rules across modules (alhai_core vs alhai_design_system vs alhai_services)
medium.fix: Create shared lint configuration and standardize rules across all modules

medium.issue: print() in production code (3 files)
medium.fix: Replace with ProductionLogger.log() or ProductionLogger.logDebug()

medium.issue: 40 dynamic type usages across codebase
medium.fix: Replace dynamic with proper type definitions using Freezed or data classes

medium.issue: 10+ hardcoded URLs in source code (WhatsApp API, SMS APIs, Backend, AI server)
medium.fix: Centralize all URLs in EnvironmentConfig using String.fromEnvironment()

medium.issue: 142 files between 500-1000 lines need review for splitting
medium.fix: Gradually refactor large files by extracting reusable widgets and components

medium.issue: Self-referential categories lack cycle protection (A->B->A possible)
medium.fix: Add FK constraint + implement wouldCreateCycle() cycle detection in DAO

medium.issue: 14 Supabase references without explicit ON DELETE rules (default NO ACTION)

medium.issue: Missing RLS policies for 5 POS tables when synced to Supabase

medium.issue: Customer model mismatch: Drift has separate customers table, Supabase uses users with role='customer'

medium.issue: Duplicate tests in design system (AlhaiButton: 22 cases + 16 cases in two locations)

medium.issue: Inconsistent test naming patterns across packages

medium.fix: Verify usage; if only for loading images, remove and use cached_network_image instead

medium.issue: syncfusion_flutter_charts requires commercial license + duplicate with fl_chart in super_admin
medium.fix: Remove syncfusion_flutter_charts and use fl_chart exclusively (MIT license)

medium.issue: flutter_background_geolocation requires Transistor Software commercial license for production
medium.fix: Verify commercial license is obtained before production deployment

medium.issue: 3 different linting packages across modules (flutter_lints ^3.0.1, lints ^3.0.0, none for alhai_sync)
medium.fix: Standardize to lints: ^3.0.0 with shared analysis_options.yaml at root level

medium.issue: Dual mocking frameworks: mocktail (13 modules) vs mockito (customer_app, driver_app)
medium.fix: Standardize to mocktail (no code generation required)

medium.issue: build_runner missing from admin, admin_lite, cashier dev_dependencies despite using Drift
medium.fix: Add build_runner and drift_dev if code generation is needed in these apps

medium.issue: 13 common packages (flutter_riverpod, get_it, go_router, etc.) duplicated across 7+ modules
medium.fix: Declare shared dependencies once in alhai_core or create alhai_deps shared package

medium.issue: 4 apps (customer_app, driver_app, distributor_portal, super_admin) excluded from melos.yaml
medium.fix: Add these paths to melos.yaml packages list for consistent tooling

medium.issue: alhai_shared_ui depends on 7 internal packages creating overly complex dependency tree
medium.fix: Remove unnecessary dependencies (e.g., alhai_sync) to simplify the tree

medium.issue: flutter_secure_storage uses insecure localStorage with base64 on web platform
medium.fix: Use encrypted cookies or Supabase session management for web apps

medium.issue: Local OTP verification creates UUID-based tokens without cryptographic signature
medium.fix: Use HMAC to sign local tokens or always require Supabase signInWithOtp

medium.issue: Stores public read policy exposes sensitive data (phone, email, tax_number) to anonymous users
medium.fix: Create restricted VIEW or column-level security hiding sensitive fields from public

medium.issue: CORS allows x-user-id and x-store-id custom headers enabling potential identity spoofing
medium.fix: Remove x-user-id and x-store-id from allowed headers; extract identity from JWT only

medium.issue: Rate limiting for OTP and PIN is client-side only - bypassable by clearing app data
medium.fix: Implement server-side rate limiting via Supabase Edge Function or Redis

medium.issue: Default store_demo_001 fallback in AI providers allows potential cross-store data access
medium.fix: Throw StateError('Store ID not set') instead of using fallback ID

medium.issue: No JWT expiry validation on client side - expired tokens sent to server unnecessarily
medium.fix: Add local JWT expiry check before API calls to avoid unnecessary failed requests

medium.issue: Certificate Pinning not applied on web platform due to browser limitations
medium.fix: Document as known limitation; add additional web security measures (CSP, SRI)

medium.issue: No deferred loading (deferred as) in any Dart file - no web code splitting
medium.fix: Use deferred as for secondary screens (AI, Reports, Settings) to split JS bundles

medium.issue: Sequential initialization in main.dart - Firebase, Supabase, SharedPrefs not parallel
medium.fix: Use Future.wait([Firebase.initializeApp(), Supabase.initialize(), SharedPreferences.getInstance()]) for ~30-40% faster startup

medium.issue: No HTTP response caching (ETag, If-Modified-Since, Cache-Control) on API calls
medium.fix: Add dio_cache_interceptor or manual ETag/Cache-Control handling

medium.issue: No LRU cache for frequently accessed data - productsMapProvider rebuilds on every change
medium.fix: Use lru_map package or select() to minimize rebuilds

medium.issue: No cacheWidth/cacheHeight for product images - full resolution loaded for thumbnails
medium.fix: Add cacheWidth/cacheHeight to CachedNetworkImage and Image.network calls for ~30% memory reduction

medium.issue: getAllProducts() and getAllSales() methods load all data without limits
medium.fix: Deprecate unbounded methods; force callers to use paginated versions

medium.issue: GridView.count without .builder in 5 files - builds all children eagerly
medium.fix: Replace GridView.count with GridView.builder for dynamic content

medium.issue: ref.watch() at root build level in POS screen causes full subtree rebuilds
medium.fix: Extract sub-widgets with their own Consumer/ConsumerWidget for selective rebuilds

medium.issue: No HTTP retry strategy or exponential backoff for API calls
medium.fix: Add retry interceptor with exponential backoff (3 retries, 1s/2s/4s)

medium.issue: No Service Worker or PWA caching strategy for web deployment
medium.fix: Configure Flutter's service worker or custom SW for offline-capable web app

medium.issue: No compute()/Isolate.run() for heavy operations (CSV parsing, FTS rebuild)
medium.fix: Move CSV parsing, FTS initialization, and database seeding to Isolate.run()

medium.issue: All 100+ routes registered eagerly in GoRouter - no lazy route loading
medium.fix: Use LazyRouteHelper or deferred loading for infrequently-used routes

medium.issue: ScreenPreloader static cache without size limits (dead code with memory risk)
medium.fix: Either activate with LRU eviction or remove dead code (594 lines)

medium.issue: Simple validation in quick_add_product_screen instead of centralized FormValidators
medium.fix: Replace isEmpty checks with FormValidators.requiredField(), FormValidators.price(), etc.

medium.issue: Barcode field without validator in quick_add_product_screen
medium.fix: Add validator: FormValidators.barcode(required: false)

medium.issue: No InputSanitizer.sanitize() in quick_add_product_screen before saving
medium.fix: Add InputSanitizer.sanitize() to name and barcode before database insert

medium.issue: Notes field without maxLength or dangerous content check in receiving_goods_screen
medium.fix: Add validator: FormValidators.notes(maxLength: 500) and maxLength: 500

medium.issue: Password validator defaults all strength requirements to false
medium.fix: Change defaults: requireUppercase=true, requireDigit=true for minimum password strength

medium.issue: Login screen only checks phone length (< 9 digits), not Saudi format (05xxxxxxxx)
medium.fix: Use PhoneValidator.validateMobile() based on selected country

medium.issue: No XSS/sanitization check on instant search field input
medium.fix: Add InputSanitizer.sanitize() on search query before use

medium.issue: containsDangerousContent() used in only 5 files - not enforced across input forms
medium.fix: Apply containsDangerousContent check in all form screens accepting text input

medium.issue: Dual storage system (R2 + Supabase Storage) without clear unification strategy
medium.fix: Choose R2 as primary and deprecate Supabase Storage path, or document when each is used

medium.issue: Image format conflict: Dart ImageService outputs JPEG, Edge Function expects WebP
medium.fix: Standardize on WebP for all image storage (better compression)
medium.fixed_by: Added detectImageFormat() magic-byte detection in Edge Function to accept JPEG/PNG/WebP; corrected content-type and file extension to match actual image data; fixed misleading comment in Dart ImageService

medium.issue: No cleanup of temporary files (PDF receipts, CSV exports) after sharing
medium.fix: Add finally block to delete temp files after share/send completes

medium.issue: No URL validation for image URLs - no HTTPS or domain whitelist check
medium.fix: Create validateImageUrl() wrapper checking HTTPS and allowed domains (cdn.alhai.sa, supabase)

medium.issue: No storage quota management per store (no size tracking or limits)
medium.fix: Add storage tracking table with per-store limits tied to subscription plan

medium.issue: No post-capture file size validation in AI invoice import
medium.fix: Add maxHeight and file size check after image capture

medium.issue: No input sanitization in receiving_goods_screen before saving to DB
medium.fix: Add InputSanitizer.sanitize() to receivedBy and receiveNotes fields

medium.issue: DateTime.parse() without try-catch in 30+ locations (DTOs, sync, backup)
medium.fix: Replace DateTime.parse() with DateTime.tryParse() ?? DateTime.now() in all DTOs

medium.issue: DashboardShell uses hardcoded breakpoint > 900 instead of unified breakpoint system
medium.fix: Replace hardcoded > 900 with AppBreakpoints.isDesktop(context)

medium.issue: Shell breakpoint inconsistency: dashboard_shell > 900, cashier_shell >= 768, distributor_shell >= 768
medium.fix: Unify sidebar/drawer breakpoint to single value from AlhaiBreakpoints across all shells

medium.issue: ResponsiveBuilder duplicated in 2 packages with incompatible APIs
medium.fix: Keep one ResponsiveBuilder and re-export from the other, or rename to avoid confusion

medium.issue: Hardcoded dimensions with magic numbers in AI and report screens
medium.fix: Replace magic numbers with named constants from AppSpacing/AppSidebarSize

medium.issue: Chat message bubble maxWidth = 65% of screen - 1248px on desktop (too wide)
medium.fix: Add maxWidth cap: min(MediaQuery.sizeOf(context).width * 0.65, 600)

medium.issue: Invoice DataTable uses hardcoded sidebar width (340/80) for minWidth calculation
medium.fix: Use LayoutBuilder instead of MediaQuery minus hardcoded sidebar values

medium.issue: Overflow handling partial - only 59 of 195 screens use SingleChildScrollView
medium.fix: Add scroll wrapping to all form screens and long-content screens

medium.issue: LayoutBuilder used in only 27 of 195 screens - most use MediaQuery.of instead
medium.fix: Prefer LayoutBuilder for adaptive layouts that depend on available space

medium.issue: context.isMobile, context.isTablet, context.responsive<T>() extensions built but never used
medium.fix: Adopt context extensions in screens instead of manual MediaQuery width checks

medium.issue: ResponsiveLayout, ResponsiveValue, ResponsiveRowColumn, ResponsiveGridView, ResponsivePadding, ResponsiveText, ResponsiveGap, ResponsiveConstraints all built but never used
medium.fix: Wire up existing responsive widgets or remove dead code to avoid confusion

medium.issue: TabBarTheme uses fixed AppColors.textSecondary (dark grey for light mode) in dark mode
medium.fix: Change to isDark ? AppColors.textSecondaryDark : AppColors.textSecondary

medium.issue: IconButton hover/highlight uses AppColors.primarySurface (#ECFDF5) - too light for dark mode
medium.fix: Use isDark ? AppColors.primarySurfaceDark : AppColors.primarySurface

medium.issue: Chip selectedColor/secondarySelectedColor fixed to AppColors.primarySurface
medium.fix: Add dark variant: isDark ? Color(0xFF064E3B) : AppColors.primarySurface

medium.issue: Colors.grey used 158 times in apps/ without theme tokens
medium.fix: Replace with AppColors.getTextSecondary(isDark) or colorScheme.outline

medium.issue: Direct Material colors (Colors.red/green/blue/orange) used 185 times in apps/ bypassing semantic tokens

medium.fix: Replace with colorScheme.error, AppColors.success, colorScheme.primary, AppColors.warning

medium.issue: Weak outline contrast in dark mode - #424242 on #1E1E1E = 2.1:1 ratio (barely visible)
medium.fix: Change outlineDark from #424242 to #555555 for minimum 3:1 contrast ratio

medium.issue: BottomSheet dragHandleColor uses fixed AppColors.grey600/grey300 instead of colorScheme.outline
medium.fix: Replace with colorScheme.outline for consistent theming

medium.issue: Primary color same (#10B981) for both light and dark in shared_ui, but different (#00897B light, primaryLight dark) in design_system
medium.fix: Align primary color strategy between both theme systems

medium.issue: ~65% of animation durations use hardcoded values instead of design tokens
medium.file: modern_card.dart, shimmer_loading.dart, gradient_button.dart, order_notification.dart, payment_success_dialog.dart, pin_numpad.dart, otp_input_field.dart, cashier screens, and more
medium.fix: Replace Duration(milliseconds: X) with AlhaiDurations.* or AlhaiMotion.* tokens

medium.issue: Button press scale values inconsistent: AlhaiButton 0.95, AlhaiIconButton 0.9, ModernCard 0.98
medium.file: alhai_button.dart, alhai_icon_button.dart, gradient_button.dart, modern_card.dart, quick_action_grid.dart, pin_numpad.dart
medium.fix: Define AlhaiMotion.scalePressed = 0.95 and AlhaiMotion.scalePressedSubtle = 0.98 tokens

medium.issue: No Lottie animations - missing rich visual feedback for success, error, empty states
medium.fix: Add lottie_flutter and use for payment success, error pages, empty cart

medium.issue: No Rive animations - mascot_widget.dart uses manual AnimationController instead
medium.fix: Consider Rive for mascot character - more performant and design-friendly

medium.issue: Reduce Motion respected by only 6 widgets - 25+ AnimationControllers ignore disableAnimations
medium.fix: Check MediaQuery.of(context).disableAnimations in all AnimationController initState()

medium.issue: No staggered animations when loading lists - all items appear simultaneously
medium.file: Product lists, customer lists, invoice lists across all apps
medium.fix: Add staggered fade-in with 50ms delay per item for list loading

medium.issue: 159 showDialog/showModalBottomSheet all use default transitions - no branded animation
medium.fix: Create AlhaiDialog.show() and AlhaiBottomSheet.show() with custom SlideTransition

medium.issue: Most Curves.* used directly instead of AlhaiMotion.* tokens (easeInOut vs AlhaiMotion.standard)
medium.file: cashier_router.dart, modern_card.dart, shimmer_loading.dart, gradient_button.dart, payment_screen.dart, and more
medium.fix: Replace Curves.easeInOut with AlhaiMotion.standard, Curves.elasticOut with AlhaiMotion.spring

medium.issue: ThemeProvider duplicated identically in 3 locations (alhai_auth, alhai_shared_ui, admin/main.dart)
medium.fix: Keep ThemeProvider in one package (alhai_shared_ui) and re-export from others

medium.issue: PaymentMethod and PaymentResult defined in multiple files causing barrel export hide directives

medium.issue: alhai_shared_ui became God Package (142 exports, 7 internal deps) - high coupling and slow builds

medium.issue: AuthNotifier + guardRedirect pattern duplicated in 3 router files

medium.issue: 4 incomplete stub apps (customer_app, driver_app, super_admin, distributor_portal) not using shared packages

medium.issue: No response size limit - InitialSync loads 500-record pages without max page count
medium.fix: Add maxPages parameter (e.g. 200) to prevent OOM on stores with millions of records

medium.issue: Missing type safety in RPC responses - cast to dynamic without shape validation
medium.fix: Create DTOs with Freezed for RPC responses and validate shape before casting

medium.issue: SyncEngine retries every 30s without exponential backoff on persistent failures
medium.fix: Add exponential backoff (30s, 60s, 120s, 300s) with max retry cap when sync errors persist

medium.issue: RealtimeListener does not validate JWT session or reconnect on token expiry
medium.fix: Check session validity before subscribing; handle JWT expiry with automatic re-subscribe

medium.issue: Edge Function upload-product-images leaks error.message in production responses

medium.issue: No rate limiting in AI API client or server (except public-products Edge Function)

medium.issue: _cleanPayload function duplicated in 4 sync files with slight variations
medium.fix: Extract to single shared utility function in alhai_sync

medium.issue: ImageService does not validate image file size before decoding (client-side OOM risk)
medium.fix: Check file size (max 10MB) before calling img.decodeImage to prevent memory exhaustion

medium.issue: Edge Function upload-product-images missing CORS headers in response (blocks web apps)
medium.fix: Add ...corsHeaders to response headers like public-products does

medium.issue: EdgeInsets.only(left/right) used instead of EdgeInsetsDirectional - breaks RTL

medium.issue: TextDirection.rtl hardcoded in 21 AI widget locations - breaks 5 LTR languages

medium.issue: 516 instances of EdgeInsets.fromLTRB and Alignment.centerLeft/Right in 107 files may break RTL

medium.issue: DateFormat used without locale parameter in 4+ files - always shows format for default locale

medium.issue: Currency symbol (ر.س / ريال) hardcoded in 10+ locations instead of using l10n keys

medium.issue: No NumberFormat used anywhere - numbers always in Western format regardless of locale

medium.issue: SnackBar error messages hardcoded in multiple languages (mix of Arabic and English) across screens

low.fix: Apply responsive patterns when building these apps' UI

low.issue: Text scaling only available in cashier mode - not system-wide accessibility feature
low.fix: Consider extending text scaling support to all apps for accessibility compliance

low.issue: No responsive tests for different screen sizes (320, 375, 768, 1024, 1440)
low.fix: Add widget tests with different surface sizes to verify layout at each breakpoint

low.issue: ThemeProvider code duplicated 100% in 2 locations (145 lines each)
low.fix: Keep one instance and delete the other, import from single source

low.issue: Missing Surface Container variants (surfaceContainerLow/High, surfaceDim, surfaceBright) in dark ColorScheme
low.fix: Define explicit values for Material 3 surface container variants

low.issue: No dark mode gradient variants - AppColors gradients are fixed for light mode
low.fix: Add getGradient(isDark) methods returning appropriate dark mode gradients

low.issue: Colors.transparent used 24+ times in apps/ and 67+ in packages/ instead of AlhaiColors.transparent
low.fix: Acceptable but prefer centralized token for consistency

low.issue: WhatsApp brand colors hardcoded (#25D366) in 6 locations
low.fix: Technically correct (brand colors are fixed) but could be centralized as AppColors.whatsappGreen

low.issue: ~60+ AnimatedContainer use Duration(milliseconds: 200) explicitly instead of tokens
low.fix: Replace with AlhaiDurations.standard or AppDurations.normal

low.issue: app_empty_state.dart implements own shimmer instead of using ShimmerLoading or SimpleShimmer
low.fix: Reuse existing ShimmerLoading or SimpleShimmer component

low.issue: TweenAnimationBuilder used only 4 times - missed opportunity to simplify many animations
low.file: Various files using AnimationController for simple one-shot animations
low.fix: Use TweenAnimationBuilder instead of full AnimationController for simple implicit animations

low.issue: AnimatedOpacity used only 2 times - many opacity transitions done without animation
low.fix: Use AnimatedOpacity for all visibility toggles instead of instant show/hide

low.issue: Mascot animations use 2000-3000ms durations - potentially too slow for UX
low.fix: Evaluate if shorter durations (1000-1500ms) improve perceived performance

low.issue: No AnimatedScale/AnimatedRotation usage - manual Transform.scale + AnimationController used instead
low.fix: Use Flutter's implicit AnimatedScale/AnimatedRotation widgets for simpler code

low.issue: Not using Riverpod v2 code generation (@riverpod) - longer boilerplate, no auto-dispose
low.fix: Migrate to @riverpod annotations for AsyncNotifier pattern, auto-dispose, and type safety

low.issue: Firebase and Supabase init errors silently swallowed in production (catch with debugPrint only)
low.fix: Add production logging service for init failures; at minimum log to console in release mode

low.issue: alhai_shared_ui re-exports from alhai_auth and alhai_design_system creating indirect coupling
low.fix: Import directly from source packages instead of re-exporting through alhai_shared_ui

low.issue: Missing retry logic for Supabase RPC calls in store_select_screen (no retry on network failure)
low.fix: Add retry with exponential backoff for RPC calls like AI API Service does

low.issue: AI server development URL (http://10.0.2.2:8000) reveals internal network structure
low.fix: Move URLs to environment variables via --dart-define for all environments

low.issue: No API versioning on any endpoint (AI server, Edge Functions, RPC)
low.fix: Add version prefix: /v1/ai/forecast, /v1/public-products, etc.

low.issue: AI API cache stored unencrypted in SharedPreferences (sensitive business analytics)
low.fix: Use flutter_secure_storage or encrypt cache data before storing

low.issue: PendingOperationsManager stores operations in memory only - lost on app restart
low.fix: Persist pending operations to database (sync_queue already handles most cases; verify coverage)

low.issue: ConnectivityService uses deprecated ConnectivityResult (single) instead of List<ConnectivityResult>
low.fix: Update to connectivity_plus 6.x API: Stream<List<ConnectivityResult>>

low.issue: SyncEngine does not health-check Supabase before starting sync - only checks internet connectivity
low.fix: Add quick Supabase health check (e.g. select count from a small table) before full sync

low.issue: l10n.yaml missing nullable-getter: false - forces AppLocalizations.of(context)! with bang operator everywhere
low.fix: Add nullable-getter: false to l10n.yaml to return non-null AppLocalizations

low.issue: Locale provider saves locale with trailing underscore when no countryCode (e.g. 'ar_' instead of 'ar')
low.fix: Only append underscore when countryCode is non-null and non-empty

low.issue: Language descriptions in language_selector.dart hardcoded in English only
low.fix: Move descriptions to ARB files or use native language names only

low.issue: No automated tests to verify all ARB files have matching keys across languages
low.fix: Add test that loads all ARB files and asserts key sets are identical

low.issue: No golden/snapshot tests for RTL layout verification
low.fix: Add golden tests comparing LTR and RTL renders of critical screens

low.issue: No lint rule to prevent hardcoded user-facing strings in Widget build methods
low.fix: Add custom lint or use l10n_lint package to flag hardcoded Text() strings
